channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Environmental activist group sues to protect rare Arizona snail, raising questions about its location
Virginia man sentenced to 15 months for threatening Grenell
item.description: Richard Grenell, President Donald Trump's special missions envoy, said he was shaken while delivering a victim impact statement in court.

item.title: THE ESSEX FILES: The show must go on - WHCA reschedules dinner after assassination attempt
DOJ opens probe into Arizona State DEI programs
item.description: Arizona State University faces a federal investigation over alleged diversity, equity, and inclusion practices, signaling an escalation under the Trump administration.
